g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of features does encoder stage 1 detect?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of features does encoder stage 2 detect?')
sendPrompt('What is encoded at the bottleneck?')
sendPrompt('How does torch.cat combine features in the decoder?')
sendPrompt('How does torch.cat combine features in the decoder?')

svg.text: f1 saved here — fed to Dec 1
f2 saved here — fed to Dec 2
f1: 256×256×64 — edges, color blobs, fine grain texture
f2: 128×128×128 — shapes, rot patches, fruit silhouettes
bottleneck: 32×32×512 — "what is this object?" semantic context
decoder: torch.cat([upsampled, fN], dim=1) — doubles channel depth
